docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMBRANA, DIXON AKA DIXON PASTRANA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DIXON'S PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
